---
title: "Getting Started"
---

## Step 1: Download the Template

Go to the GitHub repository and download the template as a ZIP file.

Unzip it somewhere you can easily find it.

---

## Step 2: Open the Project

Open the `.Rproj` file in RStudio.

You should now see all files in the project panel.

---

## Step 3: Run the Website

In the terminal, run:

```bash
quarto preview
